description: A new employee must demonstrate proper aseptic gowning technique to be qualified to enter a cleanroom.

nodes.task_description: Observe the employee perform the gowning procedure.

expected_outcome.value: A qualified trainer observes the employee.

nodes.task_description: Compare the employee's technique against the official SOP for gowning.

expected_outcome.value: The trainer confirms the employee followed all steps correctly.

nodes.task_description: Document the successful completion of the gowning qualification in the employee's training file.

expected_outcome.value: The trainer signs off on the qualification record in the training management system.
